title: malaxis biaurita
intro: Malaxis biaurita, also known as the two-eared Malaxis, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The Malaxis biaurita plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to possess antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Malaxis biaurita can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
